category_sources: source_facts.description says h2o is an HTTP server with HTTP/1.x and HTTP/2 support; official h2o/h2o repository describes it as an optimized HTTP/1, HTTP/2, HTTP/3 server.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is h2o; official repository heading and README use H2O.
docs_sources: Official h2o/h2o README points users to h2o.examp1e.net for documentation; official GitHub README is also a documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official h2o/h2o README identify H2O as an HTTP server; official README says it is written in C and supports HTTP/1, HTTP/2, and HTTP/3.
